tool_args: SELECT date_hst, station_id, rainfall_mm FROM mv_daily_station_summary WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_hst)=3 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_hst)=2023 AND rainfall_mm > 1000
SELECT timestamp, value, flag FROM mesonet_measurements WHERE station_id='0115' AND var_id='RF_1_Tot300s' AND timestamp between March 4-7 2023
tool_result_summary: 850 readings; 250 consecutive readings of exactly 7999, rest are 0 or normal small values
Confirmed: 401 readings, 250 with value=7999 (all flag=0), 151 with value=0. Data matches our local copy exactly.
Normal day: 288 readings, mostly 0, occasional 0.257mm tips. Total 5.4mm. Confirms sensor was working before the failure.
